return(function(...)local H,a do local Z,b,J,U,T=math.floor,string.char,string.byte,tonumber,string.sub local function q(H,a)local b=0 for J=0,7,1 do local U=H/2+a/2 if U~=Z(U)then b=b+2^J end H=Z(H/2)a=Z(a/2)end return b end local y,n="iiihhhiiiiihssss","\243=\201\003\165\252\201\028\252\a\186\233\232\170\162\245\030\227\019\208\000\000\001\000\000\001\a\000\000\000__index\006\000\000\000__call\005\000\000\000__mod\005\000\000\000__mul"local Q=65 local j=1924 local o=true local function L(H)local L={}for a=1,#H,2 do local Z=T(H,a,a+1)L[#L+1]=U(Z,16)end local g={}for H=0,3,1 do local a=L[H+1]local Z=((a-j)+256)%256 local b=J(y,H%16+1)local U=J(n,H%Q+1)g[H+1]=q(q(Z,b),U)end local C=((g[1]+g[2]*256)+g[3]*65536)+g[4]*16777216 local f={}for H=1,C,1 do local a=L[H+4]if o and H%2==0 then a=(a%16)*16+Z(a/16)end local U=((a-j)+256)%256 local C={}a=setmetatable({},{__index=function(H,a)return C[a]end,__call=function(H,a)return C[a]end;__mod=function(H,a)return C[a]end,__mul=function(H,a)return C[a]end,__metatable=false})function H(a)local
